items.title: Burghausen Castle
items.summary: Visit Burghausen, a small, walkable town in southeast Bavaria on the Austrian border, to see the world's longest castle and enjoy a long weekend getaway.

items.title: German-American Friendship Fest
items.summary: Celebrate partnership and 250 years of American independence at the German-American Friendship Fest, featuring carnival attractions for families.

items.title: German-American Friendship Fest
items.summary: A three-day festival celebrating 75 years of German-American partnership and 250 years of U.S. independence, featuring live music, carnival rides, military displays, and fireworks.

items.title: "Alles Muss Raus!" - Theater-/Musikfest
items.summary: Germany's unique street theater and music festival brings hundreds of artists with and without disabilities from all over Europe to the city center.

items.title: Brezelfest (Pretzel Festival)
items.summary: Experience the biggest folk festival in the Upper Rhine region, featuring over 100 vendors, rides, food, and drinks, centered around pretzels and beer.

items.title: Hahnenfest
items.summary: Look forward to sociable hours with live music, tasty chicken, other food, cool drinks, a bouncy castle for kids, and bull riding.

items.title: Ramstein Summer Night with "Cuban Affairs"
items.summary: Enjoy a themed evening with traditional Cuban music, food, and drinks, featuring the band "CUBAN AFFAIRS" playing rumba, mambo, and salsa.

items.title: Zurlaubener Mosel Festival
items.summary: Enjoy a festival right on the Mosel River with rides, culinary treats, lively music, and a colorful fireworks display on Saturday evening.

items.title: Freedom Fest
items.summary: Freedom Fest at Ramstein Air Base celebrated 250 years of American independence and 750 years of Kaiserslautern, featuring carnival rides, games, food, live music, and fireworks.

items.title: Dungeons and Dragons Club
items.summary: Join an after-school Dungeons and Dragons club for ages 8 and older. Registration is required due to limited space.

items.title: Family Fundays at Baumholder Recreation Center
items.summary: Enjoy a monthly Family Funday with a hands-on craft, a family movie on the big screen, and free popcorn. Craft kits are free but limited, and registration is required.
items.dateHint: July 12, every second Sunday of the month

items.title: Legoland KMC BOSS Trip
items.summary: Join a KMC BOSS trip to Legoland Deutschland Resort. Transportation is provided, but participants must purchase their own entrance ticket.
items.dateHint: July 11, with registration open through July 10

items.title: SKIES Irish Dance Classes
items.summary: Enroll children aged 4 to 18 in SKIES Unlimited Irish Dance Classes. Summer camps are offered on specific dates.

items.title: SKIES Soccer Summer Camps
items.summary: Register children aged 2 to 16 for outdoor soccer training taught by professional coaches. Times and fees vary by age.

items.title: Burghausen Castle
items.summary: Explore the world's longest castle, over a kilometer long, offering rich history, stunning views, and on-site museums. It's a memorable experience with plenty of photo opportunities.

items.title: Burghausen Old Town
items.summary: Wander through narrow cobblestone streets, admire Bavarian architecture, and enjoy shops, restaurants, and biergartens in this beautiful medieval town.

items.title: Lake Wöhrsee
items.summary: Enjoy a perfect spot for picnickers, swimmers, and relaxation beneath shade trees, located just beneath the impressive Burghausen Castle.

items.title: Side trips from Burghausen
items.summary: Burghausen is conveniently located an hour from Munich, Salzburg, and Berchtesgaden, making it an ideal base for exploring these famous regional destinations.

items.title: Skiing near Burghausen
items.summary: Burghausen is a short drive from prime skiing destinations in Austria and Italy, making it an excellent base for winter sports enthusiasts.
